recommendations.title: In the Shadow of Iris
recommendations.overview: The sudden disappearance of a wealthy banker's wife cracks open a dizzying world of secret fetishes, desperate acts and elaborate deceptions.

recommendations.title: Yves Saint Laurent
recommendations.overview: A look at the life of French designer Yves Saint Laurent from the beginning of his career in 1958 when he met his lover and business partner, Pierre Berge.

recommendations.title: The Fool

recommendations.title: Tell No One
recommendations.overview: A man receives a mysterious email appearing to be from his wife, who was murdered years earlier. As he frantically tries to find out whether she's alive, he finds himself being implicated in her death.

recommendations.title: The Deep End of the Ocean
recommendations.overview: A three-year-old boy disappears during his mother's high school reunion. Nine years later, by chance, he turns up in the town in which the family has just relocated.

recommendations.title: Smoke

recommendations.title: The Last Journey
recommendations.overview: The red moon threatens our existence on earth. Our only hope is the enigmatic Paul WR, the most talented astronaut of its generation. But few hours before the start of the mission, Paul disappears.
